sub_modules.dct1d_8_coeff_rom: Combinational fixed-point cosine coefficient ROM for DCT and IDCT matrices.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_matrix_mac: Combinational 8-input signed matrix multiply and accumulate datapath.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_round_scale: Combinational fixed-point rounding and mode-dependent output scaling.
sub_modules.dct1d_8_saturate: Combinational signed saturation from accumulator width to output width.
